LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_20x102mmNATO_DU.label: 20x102mm NATO (DU)
LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_20x102mmNATO_DU.description:
Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons.
Depleted uranium: Uses depleted uranium as projectile core, It has chemical toxicity and radioactivity., greatly improving armor penetration.
Used by:
LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_277Fury_DU.label: .277 Fury (DU)
LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_277Fury_DU.description:
A centerfire rimless bottlenecked rifle cartridge with a hybrid three-piece design to support high chamber pressures. Used in various rifles and machine guns
Depleted uranium: Uses depleted uranium as projectile core, It has chemical toxicity and radioactivity., greatly improving armor penetration.
Used by:
LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_338Lapua_DU.label: .338 Lapua Magnum (DU)
LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_338Lapua_DU.description:
The .338 Lapua Magnum (8.6×70mm or 8.58×70mm) is a rimless, bottlenecked, centerfire cartridge developed for military long-range sniper rifles.
Depleted uranium: Uses depleted uranium as projectile core, It has chemical toxicity and radioactivity., greatly improving armor penetration.
Used by:
LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_35x228mmNATO_DU.label: 35x228mm NATO (DU)
LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_35x228mmNATO_DU.description:
Large caliber cartridge used by autocannons.
Depleted uranium: Uses depleted uranium as projectile core, It has chemical toxicity and radioactivity., greatly improving armor penetration.
Used by:
LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_762x51mmNATO_DU.label: 7.62x51mm NATO (DU)
LanguageData.USAC_Ammo_762x51mmNATO_DU.description:
Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles, and various other infantry weapons.
Depleted uranium: Uses depleted uranium as projectile core, It has chemical toxicity and radioactivity., greatly improving armor penetration.
Used by:
LanguageData.USAC_Bullet_20x102mmNATO_DU.label: 20x102mm NATO bullet (DU)
LanguageData.USAC_Bullet_277Fury_DU.label: .277 Fury bullet (DU)
LanguageData.USAC_Bullet_338Lapua_DU.label: .338 Lapua Magnum bullet (DU)
LanguageData.USAC_Bullet_35x228mmNATO_DU.label: 35x228mm NATO bullet (DU)
LanguageData.USAC_Bullet_762x51mmNATO_DU.label: 7.62x51mm NATO bullet (DU)
